summary: Iteration 25: Article Move Feature and Image Upload Folder Tree Testing Complete. Tested two new features: (1) Articles page Move function with hierarchical category tree in move dialog and drag handles on article cards, (2) MultiImageUploadDialog hierarchical folder tree instead of flat dropdown. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: 20/21 tests passed (1 flaky timeout due to network).

regression_results.note: 1 flaky failure due to navigation timeout (transient network issue)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user marc.hansen@canusa.de and test data with unique UUIDs that auto-cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two features verified: (1) Articles page now has 'Verschieben' (Move) option in dropdown menu. Move dialog displays hierarchical category tree with expand/collapse functionality. Article cards have drag handles (GripVertical icon) for drag & drop to categories. (2) MultiImageUploadDialog now shows hierarchical folder tree (FolderTreeItem component) with expand/collapse, auto-selected 'Bilder (automatisch)' option, and 'Neuer Ordner' button. Both features use @dnd-kit library for drag & drop.

article_move_dropdown_option.details: Move option 'Verschieben' visible in article dropdown menu between 'Bearbeiten' and 'Löschen'

article_move_dialog.details: Move dialog shows hierarchical category tree with folder icons, expand/collapse arrows, selection checkmark, 'Keine (Root-Kategorie)' option

article_drag_handles.details: GripVertical drag handles visible on article cards for drag & drop functionality

article_category_sidebar.details: Category tree in sidebar is droppable target for drag & drop using @dnd-kit DroppableCategoryItem component

image_upload_folder_tree.details: Hierarchical folder tree in MultiImageUploadDialog replacing flat dropdown. Shows folders with folder icons, expand/collapse chevrons

image_upload_auto_folder.details: 'Bilder (automatisch)' selected by default with checkmark indicator

image_upload_new_folder.details: 'Neuer Ordner' button shows input field for creating new folders
